title: General care activities recommended ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for General care activities recommended ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.D.DE238.en: Counsel on risk reduction and prevention

HIV.D.DE239.en: Assess, prevent and manage noncommunicable diseases

HIV.D.DE240.en: Screen for and manage mental health problems

HIV.D.DE241.en: Screen for and manage and substance use issues

HIV.D.DE244.en: Conduct a nutritional assessment and counsel on nutrition

HIV.D.DE245.en: Conduct a growth and development assessment

HIV.D.DE246.en: Provide support on infant and child feeding
